items.text:
🎬 Action Performer / Physical Actor (Hannover)

Hey, ich bin Nsimba (28) und baue aktuell gezielt meine Präsenz als physischer Performer im Bereich Film & Action auf.

Mein Fokus:

– dynamische Bewegung & Körperkontrolle  

– Fight / Action-orientierte Performance  

– starke visuelle Präsenz & Charakter  

Ich interessiere mich für:

– Filmprojekte (Action, Musikvideo, experimentell)  

– Fight Choreography / Stunt-Richtung  

– Kollaborationen mit kreativen Leuten  

– Filmemacher für Action-/Fight-Szenen

– Kontakte im Bereich Stunts / Performance

Ich bringe Energie, Ausdruck und die Bereitschaft, mich voll reinzugeben.

Wenn du an Projekten arbeitest oder in die Richtung gehst → meld dich 🤝

items.title: Ready if u even could need me

items.text:
Hi guys,

My name's Shaun and I'm a casting assistant producer at Bright Entertainment. 

I'm currently working on Name That Tune (hosted by the wonderful Alison Hammond), and we're on the lookout for musically-minded individuals to come and take part.

Can you really name that legendary anthem in just two notes? Now is the time to put your money where your mouth is. Go head-to-head in high-stakes rounds for the chance to walk away with thousands of pounds!

Apply now: [https://eu.castitreach.com/a/itv/namethattune/welcome](https://eu.castitreach.com/a/itv/namethattune/welcome?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExS3V4S2Y0cVNNeUhmUHN1b3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7EFprXqv66mKUmApHVmhoTWOgVhXTHLvbIgdtT2XwUmxLs1TK-FPrX4JEopA_aem_JbsyGlwFueqqXPawBjMsaw)

items.title: Hi guys,

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON (PAID)

We’re shooting a short TikTok-style video in London and are currently casting the following roles:

👵 Grandmother (60+)
📅 8 May
💰 Paid (£350–£400)
Looking for a warm, natural presence

👩 Female (20s)
📅 8 May
💰 Paid (£350–£400)
Natural, expressive, comfortable on camera

👨 Male (20s–30s)
📅 8 or 10 May
💰 Paid (£350–£400)
Confident, friendly, good on camera

All roles are for a short-form scripted video (social media / TikTok style).  
Small team, relaxed and friendly shoot.

📍 London  
⏰ 6–8 hours  

If interested, please comment or DM me with your profile / photos.

Thanks!

Hallo zusammen,

anbei unsere neuen, spannenden Workshop-Angebote für Schauspieler*innen. Die Workshops "Stunt" und "Quereinsteiger" sind für alle Berufsgruppen zugänglich. 

Alle weiteren Infos unter folgendem Link: https://www.engelspost-management.com/workshops-coachings/workshops-und-weiterbildungen/

Wir freuen uns über Eure Anmeldungen.

Viele Grüße & Happy Weekend.

CASTING CALL – PAID (LOS ANGELES)
Casting a female actor for a dramatic scene from Batman Forever (Dr. Meridian role).

Details:

• Female, 20–25 (or looks early–mid 20s)

• One-day shoot (date TBD)

• Rate: $200

• Non-union

Project:

University-level directing assignment. Dialogue-driven scene with strong emotional tone.

Additional:

• Copy, credit, and footage provided

• Small, professional set

To Submit:

Please DM with headshot, resume, and reel (if available)

sharedPost.text:
# ⚖️ ...And Justice for All (1979) 🎬

## 🎭 Overview & Setting

**...And Justice for All** is a 1979 American legal drama film directed by Norman Jewison, starring Al Pacino, Jack Warden, and John Forsythe, with the Oscar-nominated screenplay written by Valerie Curtin and Barry Levinson. It was filmed on location in Baltimore, including the actual courthouse area. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/...And_Justice_for_All_(film)) 🏛️ The film belongs to that golden era of 1970s cinema when Hollywood wasn't afraid to take on big, uncomfortable truths about American society. It blends courtroom drama with dark comedy and raw emotional intensity, creating a viewing experience that is impossible to forget. The streets of Baltimore serve as the perfect grimy, realistic backdrop for a story about a legal system crumbling under the weight of its own corruption and hypocrisy. 🌆🗽

## 👨‍⚖️ The Story of Arthur Kirkland

Arthur Kirkland, played by Al Pacino, is an idealistic defense attorney in Baltimore, known for his unwavering belief in justice and ethical conduct. The film opens with Kirkland being held in contempt of court for attacking Judge Henry T. Fleming, highlighting the deep tension between them. [Spoiler Town](https://spoilertown.com/and-justice-for-all-1979/) 😤🔥 Arthur is not your typical slick, money-hungry lawyer — he is a man who genuinely, passionately cares about the people he represents. He visits his aging grandfather every week at a nursing home, showing a warmth and personal loyalty that stands in sharp contrast to the cold, indifferent legal machine grinding away around him. 👴❤️ He is the kind of man who cannot separate his heart from his work, and it is precisely this quality that makes his eventual breakdown so powerful and heartbreaking.

## 😱 The Impossible Moral Dilemma

It is well known that Arthur hates Judge Fleming. It is because of that public knowledge that Fleming requests Arthur to be his defense attorney when he is charged with the violent rape of Leah Shepard. [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0078718/plotsummary/) 😨 This is the film's central and most devastating hook — imagin

items.previewTitle:
🎬 Unleash Your Acting Potential with Sarfraz Khan! 🎭

Dream of commanding the stage or shining on screen? Our acting academy is your gateway to mastering the craft! Whether you're a beginner or an experienced performer, we provide world-class training, hands-on workshops, and real performance opportunities to polish your talent.

✨ Why Choose Us?
✅ Learn from industry veteran Sarfraz Khan s/o Kader Khan (Theatre & Film)
✅ Build confidence, technique & artistic expression
✅ Perform in live shows & productions
✅ Personalized coaching for stage & screen acting

"Acting is not about pretending—it’s about becoming." – Let us help you transform into the actor you’re meant to be!

📢 Limited Seats Available! Enroll Now & Step Into the Spotlight!

#ActingSchool #BecomeAnActor #ActingClasses #DreamBig #KaderKhan #SarfrazKhan #TheatreTraining #FilmActing #ActingCoach #PerformanceArt #DramaSchool #ActingDreams #StageToScreen #ActorLife #CreativeJourney #UnleashYourTalent

sharedPost.text:
𝗠𝗮𝘆 𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻? 𝗬𝗘𝗦! May Summer Acting with Dancing Workshop ang Acting Core sa lugar kung saan ang pag-arte at pagsayaw ang matututunan! Matuto umarte ng pang-television, film, at commercial kasama ang FAMAS actor na si 𝗔𝗱𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗖𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗱𝗼. Learn Hip-hop dance for beginners with our new instructor 𝗝𝗼𝘀𝗵𝘂𝗮 𝗟𝗶𝗺, to push your limits and unlock your full performance energy using your body. 🌴☀️

What’s inside our Summer Workshop? 
✅Acting training for Television, film, and commercials.
✅Experience being part of our workshop’s final performance, “Stranded on an Island.”
✅Basic Hip-hop dance Workshop.
✅Dance Recital at the end of the session.
✅Plus exciting surprise inclusions!

👦Open to ages 8 - 15 years old! With or without experience is okay!

📆How to enroll? Register through our GForm Link -> https://forms.gle/gT7sUTXyWC2zSv579

❗️ Reserve your slot early and get a discount! 

#actingcore #summerworkshop #workshopph

items.text: TEATRO DA TERRA estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro

sharedPost.text:
Estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro

7 a 16 Maio
quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do 
Fórum Cultural do Seixal

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal
Biblioteca Municipal
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil. 
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde em, tantas partes do mundo se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans.

com
JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA
e o projeto TÁS NA MIRA

encenação, espaço cénico
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS
vídeo
JOSÉ BUDHA
música
JAIME FILIPE
assistência de encenação
SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção
FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção, luz
PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção
TEATRO DA TERRA   2026   M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude e Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

sharedPost.text:
📚ITW is launching a new Transition Year Musical Theatre programme in partnership with Ashfield College. Starting September 2026!
You can have a quick preview of this unique programme in this post.
More information on our website www.itwstudios.ie in our Transition Year page. You can also register your interest there. 👀

Time to start a new exciting adventure for us, forever led by our love for performing arts. 🎭

Thanks for reading & please share!
.

items.text:
When the city falls asleep, a different world wakes up.
Neon lights glow brighter, rain hits the pavement, and the shadows begin to move.

This is where the real stories begin — not in daylight, not in crowded streets, but in the quiet corners of the night where only the fearless dare to walk.

The city can build heroes… but sometimes it creates something far more dangerous.
A rebel who refuses to follow the rules.
Someone who learned the streets, survived the chaos, and turned every struggle into strength.

Every alley holds a memory.
Every neon reflection hides a story.
And every challenge only made him stronger.

People whisper his name in the darkness, not because they know him… but because they know what he’s capable of.

The night shaped his courage.
The city forged his reputation.
And now the streets belong to the one who was never afraid of the dark.

The night built a rebel…
and the city fears his name. 🌆⚡

#CityRebel #NeonNight #CinematicPoster #UrbanLegend #AntiHeroVibes #AIArt #DigitalCreator #CyberpunkCity #FearlessMindset #ViralPoster

items.text:
КОРОЛЕВСТВО БАХРЕЙН (МАНАМА) 🇧🇭🏖️
⭐ Работа в лучших заведениях города, при пятизвездочных отелях.

💰 Зарплата от 2000$ (система чаевых, БЕЗ КОНСУМАЦИИ! Во время работы с гостями сидеть не нужно!)

🎤 Время работы 21:00–2:30

❗ Контракт от 3–4 мес (Старт в Мае)

Предоставляем:

✔️ Билет в обе стороны (из Мск и обратно)

✔️ Рабочая виза

✔️ Комфортные апартаменты со всеми удобствами (бассейн, тренажерный зал, сауна)

✔️ Проживание по 2 человека в комнате

💛 Адекватное, русскоговорящее начальство и полная безопасность.

Требования:

⭐ Вокальные или танцевальные навыки. Приятная внешность и красивая фигура. Желание работать и зарабатывать.

От 20 лет

По всем вопросам - Telegram: +973 3885 4605

items.text:
🎬 FILM FABULARNY (Warszawa) 🎬
Do filmu fabularnego z gwiazdorską obsadą poszukujemy statystów i epizodystów!

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa

👥 KOGO SZUKAMY:

📅 11.05
• starsza Pani (55–75 lat) – rola babci jednego z bohaterów

📅 13.05
• starszy Pan (55–75 lat) – rola rolnika
• mężczyzna (35–60 lat) – rola listonosza

📅 15.05
• kobiety (30–50 lat) – kelnerki w przydrożnym barze
• osoby w każdym wieku – klienci baru
• goście przydrożnego baru – „szemrane towarzystwo”

👉 Mile widziani: motocykliści, rockmani, punki 🤘

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:
Wyślij maila na: Ludzie@unagimedia.pl

W treści podaj:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• wzrost
• rozmiar ubrania
• numer telefonu
• zdjęcia twarzy i całej sylwetki

📌 W tytule wpisz: KR + data zgłoszenia
(np. KR11, KR13, KR15)

📝 Możesz też zgłosić się przez formularz:
https://forms.gle/sGvXYQhvWn81iVDg7

💰 Stawka: 110 zł (gotówka po planie)

🎥 Przeżyj z nami przygodę na planie filmowym!

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Casting do NOWEGO 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie! 
7 ról, fajne stawki!!!! Można się zgłaszać do więcej niż jednej roli, jeśli się pasuje 🙂 Więcej informacji o tym, jak się zgłosić, gdzie i do kogo, na samym dole.

1. Marcin Karwowski (16) – średniego wzrostu, nosi okulary, łatwo się emocjonuje. (1, 2, 5) 

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 22.05 i 23.05

Stawka: 1000zł na rękę 

2. Stanisław Korczykowski (16) – wysoki, przesadnie pewny siebie nastolatek. Długie włosy, fryzura podobna do Krysiaka (1, 2) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 22.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

3. Magdalena Ostrowska (39) – wspólniczka Krysiaka, zajmuje się przemytem narkotyków; sprytna, ostra, nieprzyjemna. Cera palaczki. (7, 8, 9) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.05

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

4. Borek (27) – diler; postawny, groźny, mile widziane tatuaże. (13, 14, 15) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

5. Przemysław Krysiak (37) – zajmuje się przemytem narkotyków; wzrostem pasuje do Staśka, groźny z twarzy, z dłuższymi włosami. (18A, 19, 20) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.05

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

6. Barman (24) – niedoświadczony barman; lekki zarost, wąs, megaloman.  (13, 16) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

7. Sebastian „Borsuk” Borowicz (35) – zajmuje się przemytem narkotyków; postawny, sprawny fizycznie, z obfitym zarostem. (23A, 24) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 22.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 
 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:
* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube
* aktualne zdjęcie
* wiek, wzrost, wagę
* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 
* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

7. Sebastian „Borsuk” Borowicz (35) – zajmuje się przemytem narkotyków; postawny, sprawny fizycznie, z obfitym zarostem. (23A, 24) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 22.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 
 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:
* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube
* aktualne zdjęcie
* wiek, wzrost, wagę
* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 
* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

sharedPost.text:
Kamed Studio 

🎬 CASTING – STAND-IN (ŁÓDŹ)

Do produkcji zdjęciowej realizowanej w Łodzi poszukujemy mężczyzny jako stand-in aktora.

📏 Wymagania (zbliżone):
- wzrost ok. 190 cm  
- klatka piersiowa: ok. 114 cm  
- kołnierzyk: ok. 48 cm  
- pas: ok. 95 cm  
- biodra: ok. 112 cm  
- rozmiar buta: ok. 47  
- preferowany wygląd: głowa ogolona (dopuszczalny niewielki zarost)

📅 Terminy zdjęć (do potwierdzenia):
- 8 maja (piątek) – prawdopodobnie zdjęcia dzienno-nocne  
- 12 maja (wtorek) – prawdopodobnie zdjęcia nocne  
- 14 maja (czwartek) – prawdopodobnie zdjęcia nocne  

📍 Lokalizacja: Łódź  

💰 Stawka: 250–400 zł / dzień zdjęciowy  
(w zależności od godzin pracy i pory zdjęć)

⚠️ WAŻNE:  
Brak zwrotu kosztów dojazdu i noclegu – preferowane osoby z Łodzi i okolic.

📩 Zgłoszenia:  
Prosimy przesyłać na adres e-mail:

 lodz.kamedstudio2026@gmail.com 

📌 W zgłoszeniu należy podać:
- imię i nazwisko  
- numer telefonu  
- aktualne wymiary  
- 2 aktualne zdjęcia: portret oraz sylwetka

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

sharedPost.text:
What a fantastic group of singers, voice teachers and speech therapists you are! 🙌
Today we worked intensively on larynx height, AES, cricoid and thyroid tilt, jaw and lip movement, and anchoring – and I’m already looking forward to the next days together.

Stimmtraining in Frankfurt am Main – online & vor Ort 🎤💻 | Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶

Today we dove furthermore into the fascinating world of voice anatomy, practical aspects and acoustics. Alongside all the theory, there was plenty of practice, exchange, and shared learning – with joy, curiosity, and lots of aha moments guaranteed ✨

I’m really excited for Day 4 and 5 with you 🥳
Here’s to new insights, exciting exercises, and your continued vocal growth 💪🎤💫

📌Stimmtraining Anmeldung im Institut Rummel (Frankfurt), in Luxemburg oder Online

items.text:
SHORT FILM CASTING CALL
Looking to cast two male leads for an ambitious student short film.

A gravely injured young man washes up on a desolate stretch of the Northern Irish coast, with no memory of how he got there. Taken in by a guarded young clergyman three weeks away from his own ordination, an intense and dangerous closeness develops between them - until the mystery of the stranger's origins threatens to consume them both.

All information about auditions/self-tapes are available in the audition pack below.

Hope to see you there!
items.previewDescription: MENFOLK - A SHORT FILM Audition Pack CASTING CALL We are looking for two male lead characters for a character-driven short film centred on two young men. The project explores identity, faith, and emotional connection with a restrained, naturalistic tone. Feel free to contact us at menfolkf...

items.text:
POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW!
Na plan niezależnego filmu krótkometrażowego (projekt non-profit) poszukujemy statystów – każdy typ urody, w każdym wieku (ale osoby pełnoletnie). Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego.

📍 Lokalizacja: Katowice

📅 Termin zdjęć: 20 maja (środa)

⏰ Godziny oraz szczegóły organizacyjne podamy indywidualnie bliżej dnia zdjęciowego

Jeśli chcesz zobaczyć, jak wygląda plan filmowy od środka i wziąć udział w ciekawym projekcie o kosmicznym świecie na Ziemi, zapraszamy!!

👉 Zgłoszenia przyjmuję w wiadomości prywatnej lub odezwę się do osób z komentarzy.

A post apocalyptic student short film following a girl as she awakes and tries to find her dad, whilst dealing with her uncle keeping a secret and zombies on the prowl. We are looking for actors who fit the following descriptions: Lucy (Playing age around 18) girl who wakes in the apocalypse and is determined to find her father. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th."

May be an image of text that says "Jim (Playing age 40s) Former military and current doomsday p person. Lucy's uncle who hides a secret from her. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th. John (Playing age 40s) Lucy's loving father. Must be available on May 15th Zombie (Playing age around 18) A zombie Lucy encounters. Must be available on May 22nd If you are interested email 22308662@bucks.ac.uk This will be unpaid work but transport and food on the shooting days will be covered. Shooting will take place at Buckinghamshire New University's High Wycombe campus."

items.text:
Hey everyone!

I’m building out a strong acting/modeling portfolio and could use some outside perspective.

I already have commercials and video work in my portfolio, but I’m dialing in the photo side and want honest input on what actually stands out for industry use.

Here’s a folder with all my raw images:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OPstwrVcfZw2b7rJ0EN3xbOM2Os0H1K8?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OPstwrVcfZw2b7rJ0EN3xbOM2Os0H1K8?usp=sharing)

If you’re open to helping:

• Open the folder in grid view  

• Scroll through and pick the strongest shots for acting/modeling  

• When you find one you like, open it and comment: YES  

Only mark the ones you genuinely think are strong. No need to go through everything.

If you can, try to keep it to your top 15–30 images.

Appreciate any time you put into this. Getting real outside feedback helps me narrow this down fast.

items.text:
🚨CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (NON-UNION, ATL)
Synopsis

A romantic drama that follows the lives of Tay and Ted from when they meet at 6 years old, to their adult lives as they navigate life’s obstacles without letting it tear them apart.

SVS Productions 

Non-Union

Shoot Dates: June 5th-10th, 2026

Compensation: Copy/Credit/Meals

Location: Atlanta, GA

Local Atlanta hires only.

Submission Deadline: May 6th, 2026

Available Roles:

TAY CAMERON – LEAD

Black female, ages 25–35 (must be able to portray ages 18–30 throughout the film).

Beautiful, prissy, and driven. Tay knows exactly what she wants for her future, but struggles to balance her career ambitions with her relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with the character Ted. No full make-out scenes.

TED BURGESS – LEAD

Black male, ages 25–35, 5’10” and over.

Very caring and loving. Ted deeply loves Tay but is growing tired of her consistently putting her career before their relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with Tay. No full make-out scenes.

YOUNG TED BURGESS – SUPPORTING

Black male, age 6-10. 

Ted meets Tay at this age and they develop a bond. He is caring and charismatic. 

SANDRA – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 40–50.

Ted’s mother. Outgoing, confident, and sexy.

LOGAN – SUPPORTING

Black male, ages 40–50.

Sandra’s husband. Well-dressed, educated, and polished.

GRANNY – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 60–75.

Logan’s mother and Ted’s grandmother. She helped raise Ted and played a major role in shaping him into the gentleman he is today.

Submission Instructions

Please submit headshot, resume, reel & or demo clips (if available) to: miles@svsmobb.com. Subject Line: [Role Name] Submission

Break a leg!
items.previewDescription: SVS Productions is a Multi-Media company that specializes in creating DOPE content for the world.

A romantic drama that follows the lives of Tay and Ted from when they meet at 6 years old, to their adult lives as they navigate life’s obstacles without letting it tear them apart.

SVS Productions 

Non-Union

Shoot Dates: June 5th-10th, 2026

Compensation: Copy/Credit/Meals

Location: Atlanta, GA

Local Atlanta hires only.

Submission Deadline: May 6th, 2026

Available Roles:

TAY CAMERON – LEAD

Black female, ages 25–35 (must be able to portray ages 18–30 throughout the film).

Beautiful, prissy, and driven. Tay knows exactly what she wants for her future, but struggles to balance her career ambitions with her relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with the character Ted. No full make-out scenes.

TED BURGESS – LEAD

Black male, ages 25–35, 5’10” and over.

Very caring and loving. Ted deeply loves Tay but is growing tired of her consistently putting her career before their relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with Tay. No full make-out scenes.

YOUNG TED BURGESS – SUPPORTING

Black male, age 6-10. 

Ted meets Tay at this age and they develop a bond. He is caring and charismatic. 

SANDRA – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 40–50.

Ted’s mother. Outgoing, confident, and sexy.

LOGAN – SUPPORTING

Black male, ages 40–50.

Sandra’s husband. Well-dressed, educated, and polished.

GRANNY – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 60–75.

Logan’s mother and Ted’s grandmother. She helped raise Ted and played a major role in shaping him into the gentleman he is today.

Submission Instructions

Please submit headshot, resume, reel & or demo clips (if available) to: miles@svsmobb.com. Subject Line: [Role Name] Submission

Break a leg!

items.text:
Casting Quantum Entanglement
**Production Type: **Independent Short Film

**Contact: **QuantumEntanglementCasting@gmail.com

**Run time:** Short

**Compensation: **Paid (see individual characters for specifics)

**Filming Window: **July 25-29 (tentative)

**Filming Location:** Denver area

**Casting window:** Submissions deadline: May 10, in-person callbacks May 15 and May 23rd.

Synopsis: Quantum Entanglement is a short sci-fi rom-com exploring themes of consciousness, AI sentience, Quantum Physics and mythology within the context of the radical, risk-taking vulnerability required for human connection.

Logline: A lonely physics professor with hidden telekinetic powers settles for the safety of an AI girlfriend—until a spark with a human colleague forces him to choose between keeping his secret and risking a real shot at love.

***We are committed to diverse, inclusive casting to represent all cultures that exist within Academia, where our story takes place. We are open to submissions from qualified performers, without regard to disability, race, age, color, national origin, ethnic origin or any other basis unless specifically indicated.**** * 

**Character Breakdown:**

**Jyn:**  (Supporting)  Female, 40’s, any ethnicity. A humanities professor with a penchant for mythology, she’s warm, artsy, put-together, grounded, quick-witted and clever (her mouth moves almost as fast as her mind), has a strong sense of self and and is very at home in her physical body.  Intimacy details: one scripted kiss. Will have an Intimacy Coordinator for the project who will be on set during filming of all intimacy scenes. RATE: $300 flat (estimated 3-4 days)

**BERU:** (Supporting) Female, 18+, VO only, but will be recorded on set during filming. She’s a robot with a maternal instinct, anxiety and a southern accent. Her voice is soothing, warm, and polished with clarity and pristine enunciation. Think Reese Witherspoon. RATE: $300 flat (estimated 3-4 days)

**Wren:**  (Supporting) Gender non-conforming, 18-30. Intelligent, curious, adventurous, open-minded, has Gen Z non binary street style with flair. Highly encourage nonbinary actors with a range of comedy experience, from deadpan to slapstick, to submit. RATE: $100 (1 day)

**Please submit headshot/resume/demos to:**

**[QuantumEntanglementCasting@gmail.com](mailto:QuantumEntanglementCasting@gmail.com)**** no later than May 10th. Self-tapes will be requested from select submissions. **

**Production Team:** Ann Allsopp (Director), Shawn B. Young (EP, Writer, Actor), Stephanie Dees (EP, Writer, Actor), Haleigh Burckley (Line Producer), Jason Strong (1st AD), Justin Balog (DP)

**Director:** Ann Allsopp is a Denver-based director, writer, and producer. Her films, including That Time of the Month and Heartless, have screened at dozens of festivals worldwide, earning awards for direction, storytelling, and ensemble performance. Beyond narrative film, Ann’s work spans music videos for indie artists, commercial campaigns for global brands like REI and VISA, and documentary projects for National Geographic, A&E, and MrBeast. In 2022, Ann founded Psychopomp Pictures, an independent production company dedicated to cultivating bold, character-driven stories and amplifying underrepresented voices on both sides of the camera. She graduated from Florida State University with a degree in Advertising in 2010, and completed the Writing/Directing program at Colorado Film School in 2023.

ʙʀɪᴇꜰ #094 — ʟᴀʀɢᴇ ꜱᴄᴀʟᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟ 

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

📩 ꜰᴏʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴀᴅᴀ ᴏɴ:  +27 76 180 2729  

⚠️ ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴀᴠᴏɪᴅ ꜱᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ “ʜɪ/ʜᴇʏ” ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇꜱ — ᴏɴʟʏ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ʀᴇꜱᴘᴏɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ.

items.text:
Casting Call!
I am looking to assemble the cast for my next project, a short film titled "Stoplight Fever". Casting continues through this week and closes on Friday May 8th.

Filming in: Tampa Florida 

When: Mid-May 2026

Paid: There will be a form of compensation. 

Submissions accepted through May 8th, 2026

If you are interested please send a short, minimum 1 minute dramatic monologue to Justinwphillips@vistarapictures.com along with a head shot.

Also, if you know someone you think might be a great fit please consider sharing the information and spread the word. Thank your time and I cant wait to see you at the movies!

items.text:
👉 **„Auftragsk****in“ (fiktive Filmrolle)🎬 Casting Call für Kurzfilmprojekt (Hobbyfilm)**

Wie schonmal im Januar, möchte ich nochmal auf ein Projekt hinweisen, für das wir eine Laien-Darstellerin suchen.

Wir sind eine kleine kreative Gruppe und drehen demnächst einen **Kurzfilm im Bereich Krimi/Thriller** – dafür suchen wir noch eine Darstellerin für eine besondere Rolle:

 

Gesucht wird eine Frau (ca. 25–40), die Lust hat, eine **ruhige, kontrollierte, eiskalte – aber auch leicht humorvolle Figur** zu verkörpern.

**Zum Projekt:**
• Dreh an einem Wochenende
• Gage: **400 € + Reisekosten**
• Kleines, entspanntes Team (Freunde, kein Profi-Set)

**Was uns wichtig ist:**
• Zuverlässigkeit & Lust auf eine spannende Rolle
• Natürliches Auftreten
• Interesse an Film, Krimi oder Thriller
• Eigene Ideen fürs Drehbuch sind ausdrücklich willkommen 🎬

**Wichtig zur Einordnung:**
Es handelt sich **ausschließlich um eine Schauspielrolle in einem fiktiven Kurzfilmprojekt**.

Schauspielerfahrung ist **nicht notwendig** – Motivation und Interesse zählen mehr!

📩**Interesse?**
Melde dich gerne direkt per WhatsApp oder Anruf bei Manuel:
📞 0151 55604539

Wir freuen uns auf kreative Leute, die Bock haben, etwas Cooles auf die Beine zu stellen!

In meinem Profil ist die Anzeige nochmal als Bild gepostet, da stehen noch ein paar weitere Details.

items.summary:
👉 **„Auftragsk****in“ (fiktive Filmrolle)🎬 Casting Call für Kurzfilmprojekt (Hobbyfilm)**

Wie schonmal im Januar, möchte ich nochmal auf ein Projekt hinweisen, für das wir eine Laien-Darstellerin suchen.

Wir sind eine kleine kreative Gruppe und drehen demnächst einen **Kurzfilm im Bereich Krimi/Thriller** – dafür suchen wir noch eine Darstellerin für eine besondere Rolle:

 

Gesucht wird eine Frau (ca. 25–40), die Lust hat, eine **ruhige, kontrollierte, eiskalte – aber auch leicht humorvolle Figur** zu verkörpern.

**Zum Projekt:**
• Dreh an einem Wochenende
• Gage: **400 € + Reisekosten**
• Kleines, entspanntes Team (Freunde, kein Profi-Set)

**Was uns wichtig ist:**
• Zuverlässigkeit & Lust auf eine spannende Rolle
• Natürliches Auftreten
• Interesse an Film, Krimi oder Thriller
• Eigene Ideen fürs Drehbuch sind ausdrücklich willkommen 🎬

**Wichtig zur Einordnung:**
Es handelt sich **ausschließlich um eine Schauspielrolle in einem fiktiven Kurzfilmprojekt**.

Schauspielerfahrung ist **nicht notwendig** – Motivation und Interesse zählen mehr!

📩**Interesse?**
Melde dich gerne direkt per WhatsApp oder Anruf bei Manuel:
📞 0151 55604539

Wir freuen uns auf kreative Leute, die Bock haben, etwas Cooles auf die Beine zu stellen!

In meinem Profil ist die Anzeige nochmal als Bild gepostet, da stehen noch ein paar weitere Details.

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

topComments.text: 🤣"⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst". Der Witz in Spraydosen. Zahlt die Leute!

Cześć!
Szukamy osoby do dźwięku (boom / lav / recorder) do projektu w ramach 48 Hour Film Project.

📅 Termin: 29–31 maja
📍 Lokacja: Warszawa (plan zdjęciowy)

Projekt non-profit (48HFP), ale robimy to na poważnie – zależy nam na jakości i dobrym efekcie.

Mamy już ekipę (reżyseria, DoP, montaż w trakcie organizacji), szukamy osoby, która:
– ma podstawowy sprzęt (recorder, mikrofony) lub doświadczenie
– ogarnia pracę na planie

Chcemy zrobić coś fajnego i dynamicznego

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a — napisz proszę priv 🙂

Można też podesłać znajomym 👍

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Oliwia Dobrowolska (16) – bardzo ładna, zagubiona dziewczyna z zamożnego domu. Zazwyczaj bardzo opanowana, nie okazująca emocji. Po gwałcie rozchwiana, emocjonalna, boi się ludzi. 
DATA: 20.05
STAWKA: 600 zł netto 

-Igor Zawadzki (29) – trener personalny w klubie fitness. Sprawny fizycznie, umięśniona sylwetka, dobrze biega. Nieustannie myśli o seksie, młodych dziewczynach, w aplikacjach kupuje nagie zdjęcia od dziewczyn – jara go to. Wąskie sportowe dresy, obcisły t-shirt termiczny – strój podkreślający mięśnie. 
PRAWO JAZDY
DATA: 20.05 i 21.05
STAWKA: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

- Dobrowolska (42) – matka Oliwii. Inteligentna, stonowana. Ma dobrą, zdalną pracę. Jest pewna siebie, skupiona na pracy – ale córka jest dla niej bardzo ważna i w momencie problemów, matka bardzo się martwi, żyje tym. Szczupła, zadbana, zainwestowana ale bez sztucznego efektu. Lekkie pastelowe spodnie, biała koszula.  
DATA: 20.05
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Dobrowolski (49) – ojciec Oliwii. Przedsiębiorca, stanowczy w swoich decyzjach i działaniach, ciągle liczy zyski i straty. W życiu prywatnym – pod silnym wpływem córki, zrobi dla niej wszystko, nie umie jej odmawiać. Modne dżinsy, droga koszula, marynarka, drogi zegarek.
DATA: 20.05
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Zbyszek (46) – były pracownik Dobrowolskiego, budowlaniec, obecnie pracuje w miejskiej ekipie porządkowej. Wściekły na Dobrowolskiego, nie wie co dalej robić ze swoim życiem. Zaniedbany, z brzuszkiem. Strój roboczy, jakiś kombinezon.
DATA: 21.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Tomasz Kuterski (34) – były pracownik Dobrowolskiego, budowlaniec. Imprezowicz, ma problemy z alkoholem i skłonność do nieletnich dziewczyn. Agresywny, brakuje mu opanowania. 
DATA: 21.05 i 22.05
STAWKA: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

- Sąsiadka (72) – sąsiadka Tomka. Plotkara, osiedlowy monitoring, ciekawska. Ciemne spodnie, stonowana bluzka.
DATA: 21.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Marcela (16) – przyjaciółka Oliwii. Znacznie bardziej „ogarnięta”, nie podobało jej się używanie przez Oliwię aplikacji. 
DATA: 21.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Recepcjonistka (21) – ładna, chętnie wysportowana Recepcjonistka w klubie fitness. Legginsy, sportowa koszulka. 
DATA: 21.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Klientka Igora (30-40) – klientka, którą Igor atakuje w trakcie zatrzymania. Chętnie sylwetka fitness. 
DATA: 21.05
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.
Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: o
outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach
Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text: Hello everyone! I'm excited to be part of this group. I've been a performer since I was a child and I am an acting and performance coach. I hold workshops in the Aurora and Parker areas. In fact I have four seats left in a 5-hour intensive that I am offering this weekend, on Saturday the 9th.  I also provide private one-on-one and onset acting coaching, wherever that takes me. I'm terrible at networking and I want to expand my professional circle in the industry. DM me for more info on the intensive.

Actors needed for second - Fringe Festival
Date: Sep 29th - Oct 1
Time: Between 830-930pm. (Will be specified closer to time) 

Hi,
Seeking two actors who would be willing to do a segment for a couple seconds for my Fringe comedy show in September.

Role: During my show, I will be delivering a powerpoint on a TV projected from my phone/laptop. Your job would be to facetime me.

No specific script as ad libbing/improv allowed

Person 1, shirtless or in lingerie: Hey Erin, where are you?  

Screen pans to person 2, wearing a gimp/BDSM suit or similar.

Person 2: Yeah we’re all waiting.

I will promptly hang up.

Role is unpaid (or can discuss small fee), will be credited and happy to buy drinks/food for compensation.

items.text:
🎭 TALENTS WANTED — Your chance to take the international stage 🌍

👉 Registration:

https://risingstars-talents.com/jobs-for-performing-arts/?utm_source=reg-FB-RS-ddru?mngr=SSK 

We are looking for: musicians, singers, dancers, circus performers, ballroom couples, and bands (3–7 people)

🌎 Cruises • 5⭐️ hotels • festivals • theme parks

💰 $1,500–$7,000+

Don’t wait—the stage is waiting 😉

items.title: Поприветствуем новых участников!

items.previewDescription: NeuMann versteht durch technische Brillianz, Charme, Humor und Emotionalität sein Publikum in den Bann zu ziehen. Stimme und Gitarrenspiel verursachen Gänsehaut. Sein Repertoire bietet eine vorzügliche Bandbreite – ob Covers oder eigene Songs. Großartig ist die Flexibilität, auf Musikwünsche...

items.text:
🚨 IT’S OFFICIAL! SUBMISSIONS ARE OPEN 🚨

Got a film you’re proud of?

This is your moment 🎬🔥

We are now accepting submissions via FilmFreeway!

🎥 Shorts, Features, Documentaries & more

🌍 Open to filmmakers worldwide

🏆 Get recognized. Get seen. Get awarded.

👉 Submit now:

https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm

Tag a filmmaker who needs to see this 👇

#SubmitYourFilm #FilmFestival #IndieFilm #FilmmakerLife #NowOpen

Urgent today
London or ENGLAND South

Zoom Research on Utube

Incentive £105

Looking for 11 yr old female  who use utube  to give feedback and opinions by zoom. Parent /guardian must be present during both zooms

Meet & Greet Tues 5th May @ 4pm (30mins)

Main Session Tues 14th May @ 3.45pm (75mins)

Must reside in a postcode Midlands or Scotland.

Must use utube and social media 

To take part please pm me or email androullanicolaou2@gmail.com

items.text:
POWERHOUSE CASTING IS ORGANIZING AN OPEN CALL IN SEARCH OF BODY DOUBLES FOR A SOCIAL MEDIA CAMPAIGN 

IF YOU MATCH ONE OF THE SPECS LISTED BELOW, YOU’LL RECEIVE $50.00 CAD FOR YOUR TIME ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6. 

IF YOU’RE CONFIRMED FOR THE JOB, COMPENSATION WILL BE $400.00 CAD FOR THE REHEARSAL DAY (MAY 8 OR 9***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR BOTH DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE) & $1200.00 CAD FOR THE SHOOT DAY (MAY 10 TO 12***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR ALL DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE). 

YOU MUST MATCH ONE OF THE ROLES BELOW TO RECEIVE THE $50.00 CAD AUDITION FEE

IF YOU FIT & ARE FULLY AVAILABLE FOR THE DATES, PLEASE COME TO REVIVAL STUDIOS (Revival Studios, Building E, 629 Eastern Ave, Toronto) 
ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6 BETWEEN from 10:00AM UNTIL 5:00PM 

TALENT NEEDS TO BE AVAILABLE FOR MAY 8, 9, 10, 11 & 12)

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR…

1)
FEMALE 
WHITE
5’4” TO 5’6” IN HEIGHT
HIGH LEVEL SOCCER PLAYER ABLE TO DO KICK-UPS, FREESTYLE & AROUND-THE-WORLD. YOU MUST BE ABLE TO DEMONSTRATE THESE SKILLS ON-CAMERA. 

2)
MALE
BLACK
5’9” TO 5’12” IN HEIGHT 
SOFTER BUILD

3)
MALE
WHITE
5’8” TO 5’10” IN HEIGHT 
SLIGHT BUILD

items.text:
Adult Panto Jack OFF The Beanstalk  is back in the West End for 2026 thew show will   open at Scala London in the heart of London’s West End!

 

We are now casting for the following roles only

 

Jack Trott

We are looking for an actor who can play our hero  funny humble  a strong singer musical theatre/pop sound as well as a good mover with dashing looks and a great physique.

Must be comfortable  gong off script at  and working an  audience

 

 

Dame Trott - Male

We are looking for experienced Dames/character actors who are larger than life with bags of personality as well as versatility and natural comedy must be great at working an audience and have the gift of the gab

Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

 

Billy Trott  -Male

We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother

Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

 

 

The Dates

Auditions in May in central London

Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December

Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027

We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .

Please email details/reels  to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

Currently casting for two roles:

Ahmed - a Palestinian villager (40s-60s)

Yinon - an Israeli settler (late 20s-50s)

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter.

We will have a preview show on either 6th July or 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe in August and hopefully Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals start in mid-May in Stratford and continue sporadically until the beginning of July and will take place on Sundays.

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Casting is now open for the role of YOUNGER for our upcoming short film "Hoops Edge" written and directed by Kwamé Kandekore and co-directed by Jordan Aaron.

YOUNGER, is a 13 year old boy with a passion, basketball. We are looking for a young boy with a lot of energy and sensibility. 

If you play/have played basketball (or not but willing to learn more) we want to hear from you! 

We will be shooting in London in August 2026. This is an unpaid role but expenses and catering will be covered. 

Interested? Email us at onetoomanyprod@gmail.com with your name, a recent picture of you, where you are based, a brief description and if you play the sport: a short video of you throwing some hoops! 

Let’s get rolling 🏀

Thank you, 

One Too Many Productions

items.text:
CASTING CALL - LONDON

Looking for a family for an upcoming video project shooting in London (week commencing 26th May):

- Family of 3-4
- Turkish heritage (or similar cultural background)
- Children aged 5–10

Shoot duration: 2 days

This is a paid opportunity.

If interested, please send portfolio & rates.

items.text:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫

items.text:
POSZUKIWANA AKTORKA DO FILMU DYPLOMOWEGO (Non-profit)
Poszukujemy aktorki do naszego krótkometrażowego filmu dyplomowego. Szukamy osoby, która wcieli się w rolę mamy małej dziewczynki. 

Kogo szukamy?

Kobiety w wieku ok. 30–35 lat

O projekcie:

Lucia, młoda kobieta uciekająca przed samą sobą i napiętymi relacjami z matką, podróżuje vanem wzdłuż wybrzeża, gdzie odkrywa tajemniczą czarną szklaną Kulę, która zmusza ją do zmierzenia się z prawdziwymi emocjami, przepracowania dzieciństwa i odbudowy więzi z matką.

Zapewniamy pyszne jedzenie na planie, zwrot kosztów dojazdu oraz gotowy materiał do portfolio (showreel).

Terminy i lokalizacje:

24 maja - Warszawa

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana, wyślij nam swoje zgłoszenie (zdjęcia, numer telefonu, imię i nazwisko) na maila: 

vvvvasylieva@gmail.com

Warszawa, OTWOCK!!! Poszukuję mężczyzny w wieku 40–50 lat do krótkiej sceny w serialu „Gliniarze”. 

📍 Otwock
📅 6 maja
🕗 08:30

Jako klient baru (jedna scena)
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 150 zł, płatne gotówką po planie

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na: natalia@outsetfilms.pl
W tytule: „Klient baru”

W treści:
– imię i nazwisko
– wiek
– wzrost
– numer telefonu
– aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

items.text:
Chętnie podejmę współpracę jako statystka (początkująca)
Cześć! Chciałabym spróbować swoich sił jako statystka. Nie mam jeszcze doświadczenia, ale jestem osobą bardzo dyspozycyjną, cierpliwą i punktualną. Interesuje mnie praca w Warszawie i okolicy.

Kilka słów o mnie:

• Wiek: 16 lat

• Wzrost: 160 cm

• Oczy: Ciemnobrązowe, wyrazista oprawa oczu.

• Włosy: Ciemne, średniej długości 

• Znaki szczególne: Okulary korekcyjne, septum oraz kolczyk w brwi

Brak doświadczenia nadrabiam dużym zaangażowaniem i chęcią do nauki. Jeśli mój profil pasuje do jakiegoś projektu, zapraszam do kontaktu w komentarzu, A ja się do Was odezwę!!

items.text:
## 🎷 CASTING: Aktor/Saksofonista (19-28 lat)

Poszukujemy odtwórcy głównej roli do filmu krótkometrażowego. Projekt **płatny**.

**KOGO SZUKAMY?**
* Mężczyzna w wieku **19–21 lat**.
* **Umiejętność gry na saksofonie** (warunek konieczny).

**ZGŁOSZENIA:** Wyślij maila na adres: **korab.karo@gmail.com**

**W treści prosimy o:**
1. Imię, nazwisko i wiek.
2. Aktualne zdjęcia (twarz i sylwetka).
3. Krótkie nagranie (self-tape), na którym przedstawiasz się i grasz dowolny fragment na saksofonie.

items.text: FIRST THURSDAY IS FREE! Come have a go. 🙌🙌

sharedPost.text:
Can’t believe these guys have only been working on this routine for 4 classes! Many of them have never danced before and they’re already looking BRILLIANT! What really matters is that we’ve been having a great time and moving in a fun and feel-good way! 

Why not come along for a free session and see how my class makes you feel? 🥰🙌

Thursdays 7-8pm
(From 14/05, first class free, normal price £6)

Mondays 6.30-7.30pm
(First class just a £3 deposit, usual price £6)

DM me, or comment for more info. 

#exploreliverpool #feelfoodthursday #whynot #getstarted #fitnessmotivation

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CINEMATIC ARTS PROD 3 PHANTOM PAIN**

*Synopsis: After bodybuilder, Javier, breaks his arm and has to have it amputated, The Arm crawls off on a journey of its own, and after some searching, finds and attaches to Ronnie. Javier, still able to feel the arm moving, tries everything he can to either get The Arm back or move past it so he can compete to be the Juiciest Man Around. Eventually, after failing in every aspect and seeing The Arm thrive with Ronnie, Javier realizes he has to feel in order to heal. *

We had some last minute drop-outs and really need to fill our track and field team! We are filming at Harvard Gulch Park and your call time would be 4:30 PM.

Attached is a google form to fill out if you're available so we will be able to send you more information and a call sheet! 

https://forms.gle/NKksgUYCrZn38W5N9

THANK YOU IN ADVANCE!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

**ROLES:**

**Liam ***Lead*

30-39 / Trans Man

Liam is a mid 30s trans man who fled to Colorado after anti-trans legislation passed in Kansas. Assuming the family skiing cabin would be empty in the height of summer after his father’s death, he posts up there to reconnect with himself, train to hike the continental divide, and finish preparing a moth costume for his theatrical debut in Montana. He has deep commitment issues, a degree in theater, and an irrational connection to a potted plant. He didn’t plan on his brother showing up to the cabin with the law on his tail. 

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

**Jake ***Lead*

30-39 / Cis Man

Jake is a mid 30s cis man on the run from government goons. In an attempt to get out of town and clear his head, he flees to his childhood cabin in the Colorado mountains, not suspecting the sibling who abandoned him to cold and distant parents when he was teenager would already be there. A construction worker by trade whose brawling has gotten him into trouble more than once, he’s built a moat of masculine conformity around himself and only feels safe with a gun (or six) nearby. 

Performers who bring their own experience of family estrangement, blue collar culture, and LGBTQ allyship will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled aggression to honest tenderness. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Melody ***Supporting*

25-60 / Any gender with drag queen energy 

Melody is Liam’s best friend, and she is magnificent. Glamorous, funny, and deeply principled, she leads the queer cavalry into the warehouse with queenly authority and zero hesitation. She is warm to Liam in the way of found family — no conditions, no questions, just presence. She and Declan recognize each other instantly in the parking lot: two people who showed up for exactly the same reason. They walk in together, side by side, in slow motion. She is a showstopper in every scene she’s in.

Strong comedic presence and warm queenly energy. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 

* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

 **Declan ***Supporting*

30-60 / Cis Man

Declan is Jake’s blue-collar buddy who shows up, no questions asked, with a convoy of trucks behind him. He is steady, laconic, and genuinely good. When he meets Melody in the parking lot, he assesses the situation in about four seconds and makes a plan to join forces with the queer cavalry. His walk into the warehouse alongside Melody is one of the film’s key images.

Physical ease and natural authority. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 
* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Queer Cavalry ***Supporting*

25-60 / LGBTQIA+ Community Members

Eleven queers dressed for maximum ego expression pile out of five Subarus join forces with a crew of blue collar men to rescue someone they've never met — because Liam asked, and that's enough. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to stay out of it, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who bring their full selves to this. Drag queens, trans and nonbinary performers, queer folks of every flavor — if this community is yours, we want you in this scene. Strong energy and warmth, physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the blue-collar crew arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Blue Collar Crew ***Supporting*

25 - 60 / Straight Men

Eleven blue-collar workers pile out of their trucks and join forces with a cavalry of queers to walk to rescue someone they'd do anything for — because Jake is one of their own, and that's all they need to know. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to keep their heads down, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who feel lived-in and real. Construction workers, tradespeople, outdoorsmen — if this world is yours, or close to it, we want you in this scene. Physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the queer cavalry arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Goons ***Supporting*

30 - 50 / Men

Four men, broadly menacing, are the government henchmen sent to kidnap Jake. They are hired for violence, but are more invested in their spades game than in their hostage. They bicker about reneging, argue about counting, and nearly miss Jake’s escape because one slammed a jack at the wrong moment.

Character work and comedic timing are essential. The Head Goon in particular sets the tone: quietly authoritative at the card table, supremely unbothered by everything else happening around him.

Strong ensemble instincts. Ability to make a card game feel tense and funny at the same time. Comfort with prop firearms.
* Rate: ~$400 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 2 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25 - 7/26

items.summary:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

**ROLES:**

**Liam ***Lead*

30-39 / Trans Man

Liam is a mid 30s trans man who fled to Colorado after anti-trans legislation passed in Kansas. Assuming the family skiing cabin would be empty in the height of summer after his father’s death, he posts up there to reconnect with himself, train to hike the continental divide, and finish preparing a moth costume for his theatrical debut in Montana. He has deep commitment issues, a degree in theater, and an irrational connection to a potted plant. He didn’t plan on his brother showing up to the cabin with the law on his tail. 

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

**Jake ***Lead*

30-39 / Cis Man

Jake is a mid 30s cis man on the run from government goons. In an attempt to get out of town and clear his head, he flees to his childhood cabin in the Colorado mountains, not suspecting the sibling who abandoned him to cold and distant parents when he was teenager would already be there. A construction worker by trade whose brawling has gotten him into trouble more than once, he’s built a moat of masculine conformity around himself and only feels safe with a gun (or six) nearby. 

Performers who bring their own experience of family estrangement, blue collar culture, and LGBTQ allyship will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled aggression to honest tenderness. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Melody ***Supporting*

25-60 / Any gender with drag queen energy 

Melody is Liam’s best friend, and she is magnificent. Glamorous, funny, and deeply principled, she leads the queer cavalry into the warehouse with queenly authority and zero hesitation. She is warm to Liam in the way of found family — no conditions, no questions, just presence. She and Declan recognize each other instantly in the parking lot: two people who showed up for exactly the same reason. They walk in together, side by side, in slow motion. She is a showstopper in every scene she’s in.

Strong comedic presence and warm queenly energy. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 

* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

 **Declan ***Supporting*

30-60 / Cis Man

Declan is Jake’s blue-collar buddy who shows up, no questions asked, with a convoy of trucks behind him. He is steady, laconic, and genuinely good. When he meets Melody in the parking lot, he assesses the situation in about four seconds and makes a plan to join forces with the queer cavalry. His walk into the warehouse alongside Melody is one of the film’s key images.

Physical ease and natural authority. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 
* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Queer Cavalry ***Supporting*

25-60 / LGBTQIA+ Community Members

Eleven queers dressed for maximum ego expression pile out of five Subarus join forces with a crew of blue collar men to rescue someone they've never met — because Liam asked, and that's enough. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to stay out of it, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who bring their full selves to this. Drag queens, trans and nonbinary performers, queer folks of every flavor — if this community is yours, we want you in this scene. Strong energy and warmth, physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the blue-collar crew arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Blue Collar Crew ***Supporting*

25 - 60 / Straight Men

Eleven blue-collar workers pile out of their trucks and join forces with a cavalry of queers to walk to rescue someone they'd do anything for — because Jake is one of their own, and that's all they need to know. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to keep their heads down, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who feel lived-in and real. Construction workers, tradespeople, outdoorsmen — if this world is yours, or close to it, we want you in this scene. Physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the queer cavalry arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Goons ***Supporting*

30 - 50 / Men

Four men, broadly menacing, are the government henchmen sent to kidnap Jake. They are hired for violence, but are more invested in their spades game than in their hostage. They bicker about reneging, argue about counting, and nearly miss Jake’s escape because one slammed a jack at the wrong moment.

Character work and comedic timing are essential. The Head Goon in particular sets the tone: quietly authoritative at the card table, supremely unbothered by everything else happening around him.

Strong ensemble instincts. Ability to make a card game feel tense and funny at the same time. Comfort with prop firearms.
* Rate: ~$400 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 2 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25 - 7/26
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

—------------------

Thank you for your interest in our project! Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

items.text:
#Bydgoszcz #aktor #poszukiwany

Cześć! Szukam aktora z okolic Bydgoszczy/Torunia w wieku 25-30 lat do głównej roli w moim niezależnym filmie krótkometrażowym. 

Jestem początkującym filmowcem z Bydgoszczy i jestem na etapie prac preprodukcyjnych do mojego pierwszego niezależnego filmu krótkometrażowego w konwencji satyrycznego spotu telewizyjnego. Krótka historia, łącząca z jednej strony konwencję pseudo spotu kampanii społecznej, z drugiej natomiast starałem się choć w jakimś stopniu odtworzyć klimat i motywy kina gangsterskiego lat dziewięćdziesiątych, dodając motoryzację w tle albo i na pierwszym planie. Odrobina humoru, trochę sarkazmu i spojrzenie przez krzywe zwierciadło na ducha epoki. 

Zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Bydgoszczy w drugiej połowie maja. Zainteresowanych proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej lub mailowo: [blazej.budzbon@icloud.com](mailto:blazej.budzbon@icloud.com)

items.text:
Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

LOS ANGELES CASTING 🇳🇱

SKECHERS commercial for DUTCH TV featuring soccer legend Ruud Gullit.

Seeking fluent/native Dutch speakers in Los Angeles for one-line principal roles.

Must be LA local hire and able to self-report to set in Los Angeles.

Non-Union. FICORE welcome.
Rate: $1,500 + 20% AF
Shoot: May 11 in Los Angeles
Fitting: May 8 in Los Angeles
Callbacks: May 7 via Zoom
Self-tapes: April 30 – May 6

ROLES:
Athletic Gym-Goer — Woman, 18–30
Athletic Man — Man, 30–40
Car Valet — Man, 18–29
Soccer Fan — Man, 30–40
Restaurant Diner — Man, 40–50
Waiter — Woman, 18–30

All ethnic appearances welcome.

Must speak real fluent Dutch — not Duolingo Dutch.

Submit via Casting Networks:
https://app.castingnetworks.com/public-pages/open-call/skechers-slip-ins-dutch-tv/13ced886-4469-11f1-8db6-331d4b78bece

Please share with Dutch speakers, Dutch actors, Dutch expats, and Netherlands/Benelux community members in Los Angeles.

items.text:
+++Schauspieler*innen für u. a. Studiodreh (Studio Hamburg) gesucht+++

Guten Abend in die Runde,

für die Produktion neuer Showreelszenen suchen wir, Engelspost Films, interessierte Schauspieler*innen, die neue Szenen für Ihr Material benötigen. Wir drehen qualitativ hochwertige Filmszenen - mit dem Ziel, neue Besetzungsanreize für Casting Directors zu schaffen und die Besetzungschancen der Schauspieler*innen dadurch zu erhöhen.

Als bundesweit einzige Showreelproduktion haben wir die Möglichkeit, an einem echten Filmset zu drehen. Auf dem Studio Hamburg-Gelände (Hamburg) dürfen wir exklusiv in den Studios der erfolgreichen ZDF-Serie "Notruf Hafenkante" drehen und verschiedene Kulissen nutzen (u. a. Verhörraum, Büro der Oberkommissarin, Gefängniszelle etc.).

Wir suchen Schauspieler*innen einerseits für die Studiodrehs, andererseits grundsätzlich aber auch für normale Outdoor-Drehs.

* Die Studiodrehs kosten pro Spieler*in ca. 600-700€ (zzgl. 19% Mwst.).
* Die "normalen" Outdoor-Drehs sind von den Kosten etwas geringer bzw. hängen diese dann von mehreren Faktoren ab.
* Termine werden grundsätzlich individuell abgestimmt (Für den Studiodreh wird es eine Terminabstimmung, mit vorheriger Abfrage, mit 2-3 Paarungen geben, da wir -wegen der Mietkosten- für den Studiotag mindestens 2-3 Buchungen benötigen).

Hier ein kleiner Überblick unserer bisherigen Arbeiten: [https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms](https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms)

Weitere Infos, Buchung & Kontakt über folgenden Link:

[https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/](https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/)

Engelspost Films produziert mit einem kleinen Team, bestehend aus absoluten Branchenprofis, lebendi...

items.text:
*** In need of your help*** Judith from Spain is in need of a host family for this upcoming school year (2026/2027)! 

She is 14yrs old and can be placed anywhere in the United States. She wants to continue dance/gymnastics while here in the US.

This would be a great situation for any loving family. PM me or text/call at 630-965-6363!

items.text:
Musicalgroep MILO uit Knokke-Heist houdt open audities voor de musicalklassieker 'The Sound of Music'. Hiervoor zijn zij op zoek naar kinderen, jongeren en volwassenen. Vanaf de leeftijd van 6 jaar kan je inschrijven voor onze audities via musicalgroepmilo.be

Voorstellingen gaan door in Knokke-Heist in september 2027

audities eerste ronde vinden plaats op 11-12-18-19 juli 2026

Let op: de plaatsen zijn beperkt, dus snel inschrijven is de boodschap!

items.text:
Anyone have experience with baby modeling in the north Jersey area? Have a one year old who smiles great and loves his picture being taken. just don’t want to get scammed from anyone 
Thanks ❤️

topComments.text:
Submit to agencies: 

Zuri 
Nymm 
State
Elevate 
Stellar 

Never  ever ever ever pay for anything other than commission fees after a job is done - which is auto taken from the agencies !  Ever

You’ll get scammed by not being with an agency-  that’s for absolute certain.
It’s not all rainbows and butterflies though! 
You have to be ready at the drop of a dime. 
It may take months for an audition or job! 
It’s a VERY competitive industry.

items.text:
CASTING CALL!! 

Looking for a FEMALE lead for a student graduation project. Collaborative but food & stay provided.  London based. 

Character- Ann 

Age - mid 20s

Ethnicity- all welcome

Brief- Ann is an award winning filmmaker, finds herself at her ex's door, an attempt to bring him back into her world. But seeing the life he has, is that what she really wants? 

My fb messenger is glitching, for more info and questions, you can DM me on instagram at aaryamazz or email me at aaryamasingh07@gmail.com :))
